observation: A parking lot shared by a Laundromat and three restaurants with no signs in English. The Ethiopian place has a handwritten specials board propped against the door. A man is fixing a bicycle on the sidewalk. The air smells like berbere and exhaust.

selected.name: Kathmandu Kitchen
selected.editorial_summary: Family-run Nepalese restaurant serving momos, thali, and chow mein in a strip mall storefront.

llm_judgment.reasoning: A Nepalese family restaurant in a diverse immigrant corridor. 89 reviews suggests a loyal local following without mainstream visibility. The strip mall location and cuisine type are strong indicators of owner-operated independence.
